g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a FreeCAD plugin call the FastAPI layer?')
sendPrompt('How does the web UI call the FastAPI layer?')
sendPrompt('How does a CI/CD pipeline call the FastAPI layer?')
sendPrompt('What other external callers would use the REST API?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure the FastAPI application for this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints should the FastAPI layer expose for geometry analysis?')
sendPrompt('How should I handle geometry file upload and validation in FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI dispatch jobs to Celery?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis store in this architecture — tasks, state, or both?')
sendPrompt('How do Celery workers execute pipeline tasks?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure a Celery task for geometry analysis?')
sendPrompt('How do I fan out a Celery task across assembly components?')
sendPrompt('How do I aggregate results from a Celery chord back into a single report?')
sendPrompt('How do I handle retries and failure states in Celery tasks?')
sendPrompt('Should I use Prefect or Airflow for batch assembly evaluation?')
sendPrompt('How do I define a Prefect flow for multi-part assembly analysis?')
sendPrompt('How does the batch orchestrator schedule and trigger Celery tasks?')
sendPrompt('How do I schedule batch assembly runs on a cron or commit trigger?')
sendPrompt('What observability does Prefect or Airflow provide for pipeline runs?')
sendPrompt('How do completed job results get routed to the Layer 5 visualization layer?')
